title: Deepen the Manifest interface with behavior-focused methods
description:
Turn `Manifest` into a **deep module** with behavior-focused methods: `add_chunk()`, `remove_chunk()`, `reorder()`, and `export()`. This will hide low-level details (e.g., managing `chunks` and `order`) from callers.

## Acceptance criteria
- [ ] `Manifest` exposes behavior-focused methods (e.g., `add_chunk()`, `remove_chunk()`).
- [ ] Callers no longer manually manage `chunks` and `order`.
- [ ] Tests verify behavior (e.g., `add_chunk()`) rather than internals.
- [ ] The module is used in `munk/assembler.py`.

## Blocked by
None - can start immediately

title: Introduce ChunkStore adapter for persistence
description:
Introduce a **ChunkStore adapter** that exposes a **deep interface** for persistence: `get_chunk()`, `save_chunk()`, `clone_chunk()`, `archive_chunk()`.

## Acceptance criteria
- [ ] `ChunkStore` exposes behavior-focused methods (e.g., `clone_chunk()`).
- [ ] Callers no longer manage persistence details manually.
- [ ] Tests verify behavior (e.g., `save_chunk()`) rather than internals.
- [ ] The adapter is used in `munk/store.py`.

## Blocked by
None - can start immediately

title: Extract contextual_enrichment.py into a seam
description:
Extract `contextual_enrichment.py` into a **seam** with a **deep interface**: `enrich_chunk()`, `enrich_source()`. This will centralize enrichment logic and eliminate duplication between `munk` and `all-rag-strategies`.

## Acceptance criteria
- [ ] `contextual_enrichment.py` exposes a behavior-focused interface (e.g., `enrich_chunk()`).
- [ ] Callers interact with the seam instead of duplicating logic.
- [ ] Tests verify enrichment behavior rather than implementation details.
- [ ] The seam is used in `munk` and `all-rag-strategies`.

## Blocked by
None - can start immediately

title: Deepen the Lock interface with behavior-focused methods
description:
Turn `Lock` into a **deep module** with behavior-focused methods: `acquire()`, `release()`, `is_locked()`.

## Acceptance criteria
- [ ] `Lock` exposes behavior-focused methods (e.g., `acquire()`).
- [ ] Callers no longer manage lock lifecycle manually.
- [ ] Tests verify behavior (e.g., `acquire()`) rather than internals.
- [ ] The module is used in `munk/locker.py`.

## Blocked by
None - can start immediately

title: Introduce SourceChunkAdapter to consolidate Chunk and Source interfaces
description:
Introduce a **SourceChunkAdapter** module that encapsulates the relationship between `Source` and `Chunk`. This adapter will expose a **deep interface** for working with `Chunk` content (e.g., `edit()`, `split()`, `validate()`) while hiding implementation details like `content_hash`, `version`, and `status`.

## Acceptance criteria
- [ ] The adapter exposes a behavior-focused interface (e.g., `edit()`, `split()`).
- [ ] Callers no longer need to manage `content_hash`, `version`, or `status` manually.
- [ ] Tests verify the adapter's behavior, not `Chunk` internals.
- [ ] The adapter is used in `munk/editor.py`, `munk/chunker.py`, and `munk/validator.py`.

## Blocked by
None - can start immediately

title: Extract ChunkHistory into a separate seam with a deep interface
description:
Extract `ChunkHistory` into a **separate seam** with a **deep interface** for audit logging: `log_edit()`, `log_split()`, `log_merge()`.

## Acceptance criteria
- [ ] `ChunkHistory` exposes behavior-focused methods (e.g., `log_edit()`).
- [ ] Callers no longer manually construct `ChunkHistory` entries.
- [ ] Tests verify audit behavior without mocking `ChunkHistory`.
- [ ] The seam is used in `munk/editor.py` and `munk/store.py`.

## Blocked by
None - can start immediately

title: Fix API error responses
description:
API routes return 500 on missing content files, corrupted JSON, store errors. Catch exceptions, return proper HTTP codes (404/400/409). Add tests for each error path.

## Acceptance criteria

- [x] API routes catch store errors (NotFoundError, CorruptedError) and return 404/400.
- [x] Create source catches FileExistsError → 409.
- [x] Chunkify catches missing content file → 404.
- [x] Tests added in test_api.py for error paths.

title: Fix store load errors
description:
Store load_source/load_chunk/load_manifest throw raw FileNotFoundError on missing files. Add error handling: return None or raise custom error. Handle corrupted JSON (JSONDecodeError). Add tests for error cases.

## Acceptance criteria

- [x] Store load methods raise custom NotFoundError for missing files.
- [x] Store load methods raise custom CorruptedError for invalid JSON.
- [x] Tests added in tests/test_store.py.

title: Add test coverage reporting
description:
Current 5 test files. Add pytest-cov check. Ensure core modules (store, chunker, models, editor, api) have >80% coverage. Add coverage badge or report.

## Acceptance criteria

- [x] pyproject.toml configured with coverage fail_under=80.
- [x] README.md includes coverage command.
- [x] Coverage report available via pytest --cov=munk.

title: Add content integrity validation
description:
Source content saved as .content file, no hash validation on read. Add hash check when reading content for chunkify. Log warning if mismatch. Add test.

## Acceptance criteria

- [x] chunkify_source validates content hash against source.hash.
- [x] Warning logged on mismatch.
- [x] Test added for hash mismatch case.
